summary: Completed comprehensive testing of F1RECHAT social platform (Iteration 3) - Message direction fix verified and all features working perfectly. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend flows excellent, critical message direction bug successfully resolved.
passed_tests: CRITICAL: Message direction fix verified - registered 2 new users (usera140401, userb140401), made them friends, sent messages, confirmed sender_id matches actual sender in backend API
CRITICAL: /auth/me returns 'id' field (NOT '_id') - root cause of message direction bug fixed
CRITICAL: Frontend message alignment - current user messages appear on RIGHT side (justify-end), received messages on LEFT side (justify-start)

Backend: Username+password login, email verification flow (mocked), complete registration, chat background endpoints (PUT/GET /api/settings/chat-background), admin verification with 'F1RE88HAMZA8ADMIN'

Frontend: F1RECHAT logo and branding, username+password login fields (NOT email), multi-step registration (email → verify → complete profile), dashboard with chat area and background picker (Palette icon)
Frontend: Admin Control button in header, admin panel authentication and user management, background picker panel opens and functions correctly
UI/UX: Dark theme maintained, F1RECHAT branding consistent, 'Made with Emergent' badge correctly NOT visible
Auth: JWT tokens with httpOnly cookies, session management, admin control panel authentication
